creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text: I saw that users can define PORTSDIR in their environment in case they have their ports tree in a location different than /usr/ports. However non standard location of ports tree already brings users to define the PORTSDIR variable in /etc/make.conf, so it would be very nice if portlint looked into there for a PORTSDIR definition instead of (or in addition to) looking to environment variables.
